response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or demonstrated AI-driven differentiation at scale — key requirements for a Principal Engineer in AI strategy.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages and stacks including DLang and Node.js
Strong track record of technical leadership, workshops, and cross-functional impact
concerns: No clear evidence of building or shipping AI/ML products or platforms
Limited visibility into cloud architecture strategy or enterprise AI adoption experience
No advanced degree in AI or related field, and minimal mention of ML frameworks
